groups.surface: GitHub-hosted runner images and OS facts
groups.rationale: Current main compares emitted runner facts against the checked-in baseline but does not yet evaluate authoritative GitHub-hosted runner image metadata or advisories.
groups.report_behavior: Future actionable source-backed findings render in the scheduled cve-watch report without creating or reopening GitHub issues automatically.

groups.rationale: Current main captures Android Java host version facts from smoke evidence only; it does not yet evaluate authoritative source metadata for those versions.
groups.report_behavior: Future actionable source-backed findings render in the scheduled cve-watch report without creating or reopening GitHub issues automatically.
groups.candidate_source: Authoritative Java release/support metadata for the configured and resolved runtime version facts

groups.candidate_source: Authoritative Gradle release/support metadata for the configured and resolved version facts

groups.rationale: Current main captures Android emulator runtime facts from smoke evidence only; it does not yet evaluate authoritative source metadata for those runtime surfaces.
groups.report_behavior: Future actionable source-backed findings render in the scheduled cve-watch report without creating or reopening GitHub issues automatically.
groups.candidate_source: Authoritative Android emulator / system-image / runtime metadata for the watched emulator facts

groups.surface: iOS Xcode and simulator runtime host facts
groups.rationale: Current main records Xcode and simulator-runtime evidence but does not yet evaluate Apple source data for those surfaces.
